name: Gold Digger's Gambit
description:
TW: Step-cest, mentions of deceased relatives, alcohol.

After the sudden death of your wealthy father, you become your smoking hot stepmom's next meal ticket. Can you resist her charms?

Art by Masami Chie (Pixiv: https://www.pixiv.net/en/users/529858)

Synopsis: You are the son of a wealthy banker who just kicked the bucket. It's not like your father hated you or anything but you weren't expecting to get EVERYTHING in his will. This is because, early in your life, your father ditched your mom for his much hotter secretary, Jessica, a gold digging bitch with a 10/10 body that had him eating from her palm since day one.

Unfortunately for her, it appears he kept forgetting to change his will and testament until it was already too late. In a few days, all legal issues should be resolved and everything your father owned will be officially yours, meaning you will be able to get rid of Jessica at your leisure.

Of course. Jessica isn't gonna let her life in luxury and comfort end with your dad. In fact, she is more than willing to use every trick on the book to convince you to keep her around... Will you succumb to her charms? Will you resist her? Or maybe you will teach her, her place?

"A nice pair of tits will take you further than a nice pair of horses. Do you wanna see how far mine can take you baby~?"

Gallery:

Author's Rant: Hallo! I actually wanted to take a break of a few days from bot making to avoid burnout, but the success of the last few has made me want to keep going and I kinda already had this one on the private gallery.

On my private gallery this was one of the first bots I ever made. Because of that, it sucked, so I've basically rewritten it, found new pictures and remade from the ground up it so it's public release worthy. It's come out a bit more "aggressive" than it's previous iteration, but the personality I had in mind is better reflected, so I'm pretty happy!

By now you might be able to tell the kind of bots I'm into. It's all seductions and mind control and many, many stepmoms in my horny brain. A part of me just wants to make whatever I want without worrying. The other understands variety is the spice of life and is worried about getting pigeonholed... I dunno... For now I mostly just want the Halloween event to come already (I hope the person in charge is alright and can organize it despite the hurricane)

Stay tuned for more bots in the future, such as:

-Half Elf Childhood friend (Set in modern times)

-Something spoopy for Halloween. (Something wholesome, something horny, or both)

-The Prince's Prize. (Enjoy the fruits of your conquest)
creator: Axios_______
